calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Taline Panossian, via Zoom, for Hayley Kuhn, Petitioner.

The court advises that it is dispensing with notice of this petition only. The court confirms with counsel that there are no know objections to this petition and no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Hayley Kuhn is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $597,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-01-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
